description: A square graphic on a dark textured background. A red warning-triangle icon with an exclamation mark sits at the top. Below it, glowing white and red text reads REPORT IMMIGRATION FRAUD. A line of smaller text at the bottom, flanked by small star symbols, reads U.S. CITIZENSHIP & IMMIGRATION SERVICES.
notable_text: REPORT IMMIGRATION FRAUD; U.S. CITIZENSHIP & IMMIGRATION SERVICES
